metadata.description: Personal Claude Code marketplace: methodology skills (ADRs, TDD, contracts, conventions, learnings, tech-debt, architecture, code-quality, QA) plus the cookbook recipe system.

plugins.name: skills
plugins.description: 13 reusable methodology skills (docs, process, QA, design).

plugins.name: cookbook
plugins.description: Recipe system: install versioned doc-based engineering-process packages into any repo, update via a lock + 3-way merge, check conformance with doctors.
